---
title: 'Dogs'
date: '2016-02-14T20:31:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '5217538138600685043'
blogger_filename: '/2016/02/dogs.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
---

Horses, Stars, Stripes, President, First Lady... the pack of secret service dogs.
